entries_list._comment: trigger. Fires when anyone else executes AP in same room, check if Self action should be modified
entries_list._comment2: Player is allowed to call interrupt on others, but response text will not display (results will get executed)
entries_list._comment4: fired when [target] start new action, or when [self] move into [target] room

variants._comment: this variant triggers when a chara is doing something in same room as sleeping character but the action does not include sleeping chara. For direct disruption, its hardcoded.

interrupt does not check self AP, selftags will mostly be [], so to remedy this, this response will trigger an event with eventInstance.Self == target, and inject self as argument, letting the event take care of validating everything
responses: kojo_default_event_interrupt_02
kojo_default_event_interrupt_01
kojo_default_event_interrupt_02
kojo_default_event_interrupt_03

entries_list._comment: Event trigger, fired when character wakes up (or regains consciousness). Due to fault in design, this event will launch using relationship self -> self

responses: <color=#373737>($self$) $self$对身体的异样感觉感到了疑惑</color>
<color=#373737>($self$) $self$醒来的时候发现内衣被脱了</color>
<color=#373737>($self$) $self$醒来的时候在身上发现了精液</color>

entries_list._comment: Same trigger as OnWakeUp, but this one is used instead if night assault in progress when triggered. use Relationship self -> target

responses: 尽管被吵醒，但$self$并没有对$target$的行为表露出反感……
<color=#373737>$self$感觉到了身体传来的快感</color>
<color=#373737>注意到内衣被脱下，但$self$也并没有遮掩的打算</color>
<color=#373737> $self$醒来的时候在身上发现了精液</color>

entries_list._comment: Same trigger as OnNightAssaultSuccess, but fires only when assault refused and terminated

responses: ($self$) 被惊醒的$self$下意识地推开了$target$
<color=#373737>感觉到了身体的快感，$self$立刻就明白自己在梦中被$target$做了什么</color>
<color=#373737>$self$匆忙地抓起床单遮住身体</color>
<color=#373737>终于注意到身上的精液，$self$的脸色变得惨白</color>
